rows.label: tlk70000033_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Because of big raid, lots of
shortages of things everywhere.
Big problem for lots of folks!

rows.label: tlk70000033_02_msg0002
rows.name:
So Momimi get Pyrithium Trade Guild
send over relief packages for no
money. Momimi just make it happen.

rows.label: tlk70000033_02_msg0003
rows.name:
A merchant like Momimi? Surprised?
At times like this, rely on Samod.
It is Momimi family teaching, mo.

rows.label: tlk70000033_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Now that friend says, it is
strange. Strange, strange
tradition of family of Momimi...

rows.label: tlk70000033_02_msg0005
rows.name:
But perhaps in future Momimi
is needypon, and will get a
Samod from a kindypon.
